title: ticorea tubiflora
intro: Ticorea tubiflora, also known as the "Mexican daisy" or "Ticorea", is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central and South America, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ticorea tubiflora include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as acting as an antimicrobial agent to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Ticorea tubiflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves, flowers, or roots.
